text.title: Solution Assessment — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to produce the artefact end-to-end.

step.name: lock-baselines
step.action: Define queries + sample-size targets; capture baseline values; pin baseline_version.

step.name: assess-vs-requirements
step.action: Per-requirement: Met / Partially Met / Not Met / Deprecated with evidence URL.

step.name: evaluate-business-value
step.action: Compute variance; apply bands; cite triangulation.

step.name: identify-limitations
step.action: Document gaps with severity + workaround availability.

step.name: recommend
step.action: Accept / Accept-with-remediation / Reject; emit remediation backlog with owners + due dates.
